userMessage: I'm testing a TI MSPM0 microcontroller running at 32MHz. Set up a complete protocol validation flow: configure UART on B1 CH1 115200 8N1 and trigger on a start bit, then on B2 configure I2C CH2 clock CH3 data at 400kHz fast mode and trigger on address 0x50 read, then on B3 configure SPI CH4 clock MOSI CH1 MISO CH2 CS CH3 active low and trigger on SS. Run single sequence for each bus, save a screenshot per test, add frequency measurement on CH1 to verify the 32MHz clock, query the result, then error check and disconnect.

warnings: Prose exceeded 400 characters and was truncated.

response.text:
I can’t emit an applyable TekAutomate steps JSON yet because the source-of-truth verification is incomplete for several required UART/I2C/SPI details (UART 115200 8N1: baud/parity/stop configuration and “start-bit” trigger condition; I2C 400 kHz fast-mode clock/data setup plus trigger on address 0x50 read; SPI active-low SS trigger plus clock/MOSI/MISO/CS mapping), so a complete “protocol validati...

ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"No verified command set available to safely build the complete UART/I2C/SPI protocol validation flow requested.","findings":["Verified UART bus setup commands found only for BUS:B<x>:TYPe, BUS:B<x>:RS232C:SOUrce, and BUS:B<x>:RS232C:DATABits (missing baud rate, parity, stop bits, and start-bit trigger SCPI).","Verified trigger/measurement commands provided in prompt are insufficient to fully specify UART start-bit, I2C address=0x50 read, and SPI SS trigger conditions and protocol field routing (clock/MOSI/MISO/CS mapping and active-low behavior).","I2C and SPI command specifics for the requested behavior were not retrieved/verified in the available results during this turn."],"suggestedFixes":["Retrieve/verify the missing SCPI headers for: (1) RS232C baud rate and parity/stop bits and trigger-on-start-bit, (2) I2C data direction/clock/data source mapping plus trigger-on-address (read) at 400 kHz fast mode, (3) SPI bus mapping (clock/MOSI/MISO/CS) with CS active-low and trigger on SS, and (4) the exact measurement query syntax for the CH1 frequency result you want to save/query."],"actions":[]}

actionsJson.summary: No verified command set available to safely build the complete UART/I2C/SPI protocol validation flow requested.
findings: Verified UART bus setup commands found only for BUS:B<x>:TYPe, BUS:B<x>:RS232C:SOUrce, and BUS:B<x>:RS232C:DATABits (missing baud rate, parity, stop bits, and start-bit trigger SCPI).

Verified trigger/measurement commands provided in prompt are insufficient to fully specify UART start-bit, I2C address=0x50 read, and SPI SS trigger conditions and protocol field routing (clock/MOSI/MISO/CS mapping and active-low behavior).
I2C and SPI command specifics for the requested behavior were not retrieved/verified in the available results during this turn.
suggestedFixes: Retrieve/verify the missing SCPI headers for: (1) RS232C baud rate and parity/stop bits and trigger-on-start-bit, (2) I2C data direction/clock/data source mapping plus trigger-on-address (read) at 400 kHz fast mode, (3) SPI bus mapping (clock/MOSI/MISO/CS) with CS active-low and trigger on SS, and (4) the exact measurement query syntax for the CH1 frequency result you want to save/query.
